description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical teapot with a dark brown, mottled surface and a glossy finish. The body is elongated, with a pronounced, slightly flared spout extending from the upper side and a large, rounded handle attached opposite the spout. The lid is flat with a thick, looped handle on top, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. The surface features a distinctive, irregular speckled pattern in shades of brown and black, giving it a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The spout is straight and slightly angled upward, while the handle is robust and ergonomically curved. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for both decorative and practical use.
description: A tall, cylindrical teapot with a dark, speckled brown surface, a straight spout, and a large looped handle. It features a flat lid with a looped knob and a glossy, rustic finish.
description_view_0: The spout and handle are both visible, with the spout extending forward and the handle curving backward; the lid's looped handle is prominent.
description_view_1: The spout is seen head-on, appearing as a narrow projection, while the handle is mostly hidden behind the body.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible on the right, with the spout extending to the left; the lid and its looped handle are clearly shown.
description_view_3: The back of the teapot is visible, showing the full curve of the handle and the cylindrical body, with the spout mostly hidden.
attribute_spout_orientation: Straight, slightly angled upward, positioned on the upper side of the body, opposite the handle.
attribute_handle_design: Large, rounded loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, thick and ergonomically curved.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; flat with a thick, looped handle on top, fitting snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Irregular, mottled speckled pattern in dark brown and black covering the entire exterior.
